case_title: JOSUE CEBALLES VS. UNITED SECURITY SPECIALISTS, INC., ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-30-24 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-30-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JOSUE CEBALLES, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL PERSONS SIMILARLY SITUATED MOTION TO DISMISS CLASS CLAIMS; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. JOSUE CEBALLES'S MOTION TO DISMISS CLASS CLAIMS IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CURTIS E. A. KARNOW; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/CK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2025 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Individual Wage And Hour Claims
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Josue Ceballes' motion to dismiss plaintiff's individual wage and hour claims without prejudice is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Class Claims
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JOSUE CEBALLES, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL PERSONS SIMILARLY SITUATED Motion To Dismiss Class Claims.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

JOSUE CEBALLES's Motion to Dismiss Class Claims is GRANTED as unopposed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/CK)
